estimators.name: Graeme Fardoe
estimators.title: Managing Partner / Senior Project Manager (estimating role oversight at the partner level)
personalization_hooks: Third-generation family business — Canotech founded 1988 by Bob and Ted Fardoe (grandfather + father), now Graeme + Alanna Fardoe + Randy Bowles run it. Strong family/legacy angle.
Project range $500K–$15M — sweet spot for Ashrah-size painting scopes
Commercial / industrial / institutional GC — diverse paint scope variety
Office at 544 Prest Ave W (St. James / West Winnipeg) — a small detail that shows local knowledge
They're actively hiring estimators — they have estimating capacity but it's lean. A reliable sub on-tap reduces their bid-prep load.

sources.claim: Founded 1988 by Bob and Ted Fardoe; third-generation family

fallback_contact.rationale: Father, second generation, still active per ZoomInfo. If Graeme doesn't respond, Ted is the senior decision-maker.
